reviews.review_description: How do we get a PIN for this app?

developer_response.body: If you download the newest version, you can check out the demo for free.  To access the full version you will need to purchase a pin by going to: https://xrmanager.elitexr.com, create an account and purchase a pin from the XR Catalog.

reviews.review_description: Wow! What a great way to learn how to use a fire extinguisher safely. The graphics are incredibly crisp, and the interactive elements make the experience very enjoyable and informative!
This is by far the best VR fire extinguisher app available on the market today. You learn PASS, fight or flight, and actually get to put out fires in scenarios for all fire extinguisher types.
